top_signals.title: Apple sues Open AI accusing them of stealing ‘trade secrets’
top_signals.summary: Apple has accused Open AI and two of its former employees of stealing top secret information as the two biggest names in Silicon Valley prepare to compete in the consumer electronics market. The iPhone maker said in a lawsuit filed on Friday in a California federal court that the theft of its trade secrets was [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
